name: stackpilot
description: One StackPilot entry for coding-agent methodology: exploration, design, spec, plan, TDD, review, verification, and finish. Claude Code has the full sprint adapter; Codex can use the portable internal gates.

interface.shortDescription: One StackPilot entry with verification gates for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use StackPilot as one entry that routes feature work through exploration, design approval, mechanically verifiable acceptance criteria, implementation planning, test-driven development, spec-compliance review, quality review, and finish gates. The Claude Code adapter is the current full autonomous sprint implementation; other hosts use the portable internal gates with native tools.
defaultPrompt: I want to build a feature with StackPilot methodology.
Help me turn this request into verified software.
